GetStream/Vision-Agents ·GitHub ⭐ 7367 Python · Vision, AI-Agent, Real-Time, WebRTC, Video-AI, GetStream, Python

What it is

Vision Agents is an open-source Python framework by GetStream for building real-time, low-latency video and voice AI agents, combining YOLO/Roboflow vision models with Gemini, OpenAI, and Claude via Stream's WebRTC edge network.

Problems solved

  • Simplifies the complex infrastructure required to deploy real-time video AI (sub-30ms latency
  • WebRTC transport
  • voice activity detection
  • turn detection
  • and model orchestration) into a clean
  • composable Agent + Processor API.

How to get started

Install via uv add vision-agents. Get a free Stream API key. Define an Agent with your chosen LLM (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude) and optional processors (YOLO, Roboflow). Run it to join video calls and process frames in real time.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

GetStream/Vision-Agents is positioned as a vision agents is an open-source python framework by getstream for building real-time, low-latency video and voice ai agents, combining yolo/roboflow vision models with gemini, openai, and claude via stream's webrtc edge network. It aims to provide developers with a robust, Python-based solution for open vision agents by stream. build vision agents quickly with any model or video provider. uses stream's edge network for ultra-low latency.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Traditional methods in this domain often suffer from Simplifies the complex infrastructure required to deploy real-time video AI (sub-30ms latency. GetStream/Vision-Agents addresses this by vision agents is an open-source python framework by getstream for building real-time, low-latency video and voice ai agents, combining yolo/roboflow vision models with gemini, openai, and claude via stream's webrtc edge network, offering a significant performance boost and better developer ergonomics compared to existing alternatives.

3. Technical Architecture

The project is built using Python, adopting a modular and scalable design. It leverages modern industry standards to ensure compatibility across different environments, focusing on efficiency and ease of integration.

4. Core Implementation

Main logic revolves around open vision agents by stream. build vision agents quickly with any model or video provider. uses stream's edge network for ultra-low latency. The implementation utilizes Python's strengths to provide vision agents is an open-source python framework by getstream for building real-time, low-latency video and voice ai agents, combining yolo/roboflow vision models with gemini, openai, and claude via stream's webrtc edge network, ensuring high reliability and performance under load.

5. Code Organization

The repository is structured logically, with core functionality separated from utilities and examples. This organization facilitates easy navigation and contribution for developers looking to extend the tool's capabilities.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

To get started, install via uv add vision-agents. get a free stream api key. define an agent with your chosen llm (gemini, openai, claude) and optional processors (yolo, roboflow). run it to join video calls and process frames in real time. This will allow you to quickly evaluate the tool and integrate it into your existing development workflow.

7. Summary

An essential, Python-powered utility that streamlines open vision agents by stream. build vision agents quickly with any model or video provider. uses stream's edge network for ultra-low latency; it effectively tackles Simplifies the complex infrastructure required to deploy real-time video AI (sub-30ms latency while maintaining a high standard of code quality and usability.
